review_title: Amazing tool with multiple capabilities, from digital footprint, to risk assessment with live info
description: The capabilities of the product grew with my knowledge of the platform, and it's a critical tool for my assessment and continuous monitoring.
author: Alexandre B.
pros: It brings information straight to the point, it also allow to identify data from past publications, and see what was identified even if it's no longer online. This is a great tool to implement proper compensation controls.
cons: It took a bit of time to be used to the interface, and this is because I only use the GUI. Although integrated exports capabilities are key for automation.

author: Hriday B.
pros: I like the alerts and tips on what I need to do with them. The support is stellar
cons: Nothing. It’s all good. I don’t have any issues with it

review_title: good solution, easy to use solution with excellent support service
description: we mainly use Flare for data leak research
author: Dany C.
pros: good solution, easy to use solution with excellent support service
cons: there is documentation but it lacks examples to help us better understand (elastic search)

author: Charmi P.
pros: I use the most from flare is Leaked credentials and ransom leak.
cons: I would say flare is the best software.

author: Antoine D.
pros: The general overview that Firework provides for us to help us manage our security posture and exposition on the dark and deep web
cons: I would say the reporting capabilities for the management are something that is missing but they are working on them

author: Matúš M.
pros: First of all, I would like to emphasize the willingness and helpfulness of the people from the FLARE. The integration was seamless.
cons: the product is more expensive compared to the almost free variants, but it is much more included

description: Overall the experience with Firework is great, and I will continue to use this product. It is integrated in to my cybersecurity routing when evaluating clients and performing external assessments.
author: Kristopher L.
pros: This product is great for aggregating data from a variety of sources. We can quickly view the overall posture of a client's online footprint, including exposed services, leaked credentials, and any repositories that may be linked with that client.
cons: The export features could be improved, a lot of the discovered data can only be exported as .csv, which creates additional processing after export.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
